modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't figure out how to drag a table in Word.

full_description_text: I'm trying to move a table in Word, but I just can't get it to work. I thought dragging it would be easy, but nothing happens when I try. Can someone help me with this?
short_description: Can't figure out how to drag a table in Word.
description: I'm trying to move a table in Word, but I just can't get it to work. I thought dragging it would be easy, but nothing happens when I try. Can someone help me with this?
